SEARCH
Package neqsim.standards.gasquality

Class GpsaOrificeCalculator

java.lang.Object
neqsim.standards.gasquality.GpsaOrificeCalculator
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class GpsaOrificeCalculator extends Object implements Serializable
General differential-pressure (orifice plate) metering calculator covering liquid/NGL and steam services that are not handled by Standard_AGA3 (which is specific to natural gas custody transfer). The calculations follow the GPSA Engineering Data Book orifice metering procedure and the ISO 5167 / API 14.3 concentric orifice equation:

W = Cd · Ev · Y · (π/4) d² · √(2 · ΔP · ρ1)

where Ev = 1/√(1 - β4) is the velocity-of-approach factor, Y is the expansion factor (Y = 1 for incompressible liquid, and the compressible expansion factor for steam/vapour), and ρ1 is the upstream density.

Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim
See Also:

    Method
    Description
    void
    calcFlow()
    Runs the orifice mass and volumetric flow calculation.

    Computes the expansion factor Y.

    Returns the beta ratio (d/D).

    Returns the expansion factor used in the calculation.
    double

    Returns the calculated mass flow rate.
    double

    Returns the orifice bore diameter (may have been updated by sizeOrificeForFlow(double)).

    Returns the calculated volumetric flow rate at flowing conditions.

    Serializes the calculation results to a pretty-printed JSON string.

  • Constructor Details

    • GpsaOrificeCalculator

      public GpsaOrificeCalculator()
      Default constructor for GpsaOrificeCalculator.

  • Method Details

    • setGeometry

      public void setGeometry(double orificeDiameterM, double pipeDiameterM)
      Sets the orifice and pipe geometry.
      Parameters:
      orificeDiameterM - orifice bore diameter in meters (must be > 0)
      pipeDiameterM - pipe internal diameter in meters (must be > orifice diameter)

    • setFlowConditions

      public void setFlowConditions(double differentialPressurePa, double upstreamPressurePa, double upstreamDensityKgM3)
      Sets the flowing conditions.
      Parameters:
      differentialPressurePa - differential pressure across the orifice in Pa (must be ≥ 0)
      upstreamPressurePa - upstream static pressure in Pa absolute (must be > 0)
      upstreamDensityKgM3 - upstream density in kg/m3 (must be > 0)

    • setFluidService

      public void setFluidService(GpsaOrificeCalculator.FluidService service, double isentropicExp)
      Sets the fluid service and isentropic exponent.
      Parameters:
      service - the fluid service (LIQUID or STEAM, must not be null)
      isentropicExp - isentropic exponent (used only for STEAM, must be > 1)

    • setDischargeCoefficient

      public void setDischargeCoefficient(double cd)
      Sets the discharge coefficient.
      Parameters:
      cd - discharge coefficient (typically 0.6-0.62, must be > 0)

    • computeExpansionFactor

      private double computeExpansionFactor()
      Computes the expansion factor Y. For liquids Y = 1; for steam/vapour the ISO 5167 compressible-flow expansion factor is used.
      Returns:
      expansion factor (dimensionless)

    • calcFlow

      public void calcFlow()
      Runs the orifice mass and volumetric flow calculation.

    • sizeOrificeForFlow

      public double sizeOrificeForFlow(double targetMassFlowKgS)
      Sizes the orifice bore required to produce a target mass flow at the configured conditions. Updates the orifice diameter and re-runs the flow calculation.
      Parameters:
      targetMassFlowKgS - target mass flow rate in kg/s (must be > 0)
      Returns:
      the required orifice bore diameter in meters

    • getMassFlowRate

      public double getMassFlowRate()
      Returns the calculated mass flow rate.
      Returns:
      mass flow rate in kg/s

    • getVolumetricFlowRate

      public double getVolumetricFlowRate()
      Returns the calculated volumetric flow rate at flowing conditions.
      Returns:
      volumetric flow rate in m3/s

    • getBetaRatio

      public double getBetaRatio()
      Returns the beta ratio (d/D).
      Returns:
      beta ratio (dimensionless)

    • getExpansionFactor

      public double getExpansionFactor()
      Returns the expansion factor used in the calculation.
      Returns:
      expansion factor (dimensionless)

    • getOrificeDiameter

      public double getOrificeDiameter()
      Returns the orifice bore diameter (may have been updated by sizeOrificeForFlow(double)).
      Returns:
      orifice bore diameter in meters

    • toJson

      public String toJson()
      Serializes the calculation results to a pretty-printed JSON string.
      Returns:
      JSON representation of the results
